submissionConfirmation: GeckoTerminal displayed: Your form was submitted successfully. Review window: up to 5 working days.
approvalEvidence: Owner-provided email screenshot says the request to update information for GCA has been approved.
originalSubmissionNote: The 2026-05-09 submission used the earlier pilot pool. Do not use that earlier pool as the current public market link.
followUpNote: The current official market pool is GCA/USDT. Do not submit a duplicate GeckoTerminal request unless project details change or GeckoTerminal asks for a correction.
officialEmailUse: Submitted after the owner confirmed use of this email and completed OTP verification in the browser.
description: GCA, short for Go China Access, is a fixed-supply ERC-20 token on Base Mainnet. It is a concept-stage community direction focused on the Go China macro narrative, bilingual Web3 education, public market research, and planned access to non-custodial quant risk tools. The intended Web3 Radar bridge is an access and membership layer for reports, risk-warning credits, backtests, ENTRY_READY signal review, position-size calculators, subscription discounts, and risk-control training. The contract created 1,000,000,000 GCA at deployment and includes no post-deployment minting, burning, taxes, blacklist, or admin controls. The official public pool is the Base Mainnet Uniswap v4 GCA/USDT pool, and the project has a disclosed owner-held reserve wallet.

liquidity.liquidityDepthNote: Starter-depth only; trades can have high price impact and slippage.

supplyDisclosure.postSubmissionChangeNote: Reserve allocation changed after the original 2026-05-09 GeckoTerminal submission; use these values for any follow-up correction.
supplyDisclosure.ownerReserveCustodyNote: Normal owner-controlled wallet; not locked, vested, or multisig-controlled.
